name: Kibbeh Bissanieh (Baked Lamb and Wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover bulgar with water and soak for 30 minutes.
2. Add the 2 pounds of lamb, onion, and seasonings to the bulgar. Knead well.
3. To make filling: Sauté the 2/3 cup chopped onion in shortening until browned.
4. Add the 1/2 pound of ground lamb, pine nuts, salt, and pepper. Cook and stir until meat is browned.
5. Spread half of the bulgar/lamb mixture in a well greased 9-inch X 12-inch baking pan.
6. Cover with filling.
7. Cover with remaining bulgar/lamb mixture and press down firmly.
8. With a sharp knife, cut diagonal lines across to mark diamond shapes.
9. Dot top with the 2 tablespoons of shortening.
10. Bake in a preheated 400 degree oven for 30 minutes; reduce heat to 300 degrees and bake 30 minutes longer.
